boundary_package.source: live parent d01 state over live-nest-initialized d02 state

loader.build_replay_case_cpu_blocker: State.zeros requires a GPU device; proof uses direct constructors

live_nest_base_init.note: The host SINT reference runs before OperationalCarry creation. The forecast loop remains device-resident; no CPU-WRF history file is read.
live_nest_base_init.source: native live-nest parent SINT/TR4 terrain interpolation + WRF blend_terrain + start_domain_em base recompute

boundary_operator_table.distinction: stage-entry state after previous acoustic scan/pressure refresh, before this stage's small_step_prep
boundary_operator_table.jax_boundary: JAX RK2 stage-entry after prior acoustic scan + halo, before small_step_prep

boundary_operator_table.distinction: after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep
stage-entry state after previous acoustic scan/pressure refresh, before this stage's small_step_prep
boundary_operator_table.jax_boundary: JAX RK2 stage-entry after prior acoustic scan + halo, before small_step_prep

boundary_operator_table.distinction: after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep
after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep

boundary_operator_table.wrf_boundary: dyn_em/solve_em.F after final calc_p_rho_phi, before RK halo

boundary_package_construction_vs_boundar.boundary_application: The first material P/MU/W state residual is already present at WRF after_first_rk_step_part1, before WRF relax_bdy_dry/spec_bdy_dry and before the JAX end-of-step apply_lateral_boundaries path. This localizes the current first P-family state mismatch before dry boundary application, not inside the boundary package consumer.

MU.distinction: after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep

P.distinction: after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep

W.distinction: after WRF non-timesplit physics part1; before WRF first_rk_step_part2, rk_tendency, relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep

boundary_package_construction_vs_boundar.package_construction: JAX live.build_live_nest_step1_inputs constructs child *_bdy leaves with gpuwrf.nesting.boundary_construction.build_child_boundary_package. The existing WRF truth does not emit raw p/ph/mu boundary-package leaves, so package leaf equality is not directly proven here.

rk1_calc_p_rho_step0.conclusion: Not the RK1 calc_p_rho(step=0) operator; P_WORK is exact there.

calc_p_rho_pressure_refresh_vs_acoustic_.source_fix_status: No source fix was applied because the available surfaces localize the boundary but do not prove an exact narrow production bug.

stage_transition.conclusion: P/PH work residuals become material at RK2 after the RK1 acoustic scan and post-stage pressure refresh have produced the next stage state. Existing truth does not split the post-acoustic/pre-refresh point from the refreshed pressure point.

horizontal_boundary_band_vs_interior_spr.conclusion: The worst final P residual is in the horizontal boundary band, but the residual is not boundary-only; several fields also have material interior residuals. Early P/MU maxima are boundary-band, while early W max is interior.

rk_source_tendency_vs_small_step_prep.rk_source_tendency: The same P_STATE/MU_STATE/W_STATE residual magnitudes are visible at after_first_rk_step_part1 and persist through after_rk_addtend_before_small_step_prep; rk_tendency/rk_addtend_dry therefore do not introduce the first P/MU/W state residual.

small_step_prep.conclusion: RK1 small_step_prep/calc_p_rho work arrays are exact for the checked work fields.

next_decision: If fixing rather than further localizing, emit one WRF scratch surface inside first_rk_step_part1 around phy_prep/calc_p_rho_phi state writes for P/MU/W, or emit a post-acoustic/pre-refresh pressure surface if the manager wants to split the downstream final P residual before editing source.

final_post_after_all_rk_steps_pre_halo.wrf_boundary: dyn_em/solve_em.F after final calc_p_rho_phi, before RK halo

rk2_after_rk_addtend_before_small_step_p.jax_boundary: JAX RK2 stage-entry after prior acoustic scan + halo, before small_step_prep

rk3_after_rk_addtend_before_small_step_p.jax_boundary: JAX RK3 stage-entry after prior acoustic scan + halo, before small_step_prep

stale_pre_theta_fix_surface_check.reason: The prior source/TP JSON files were generated before production live-nest theta/QV closure and name T_STATE. Reusing the same WRF truth surfaces with the current post-fix JAX path moves the first material operational-carry source residual to P_STATE.

unresolved_risks: Existing WRF truth does not emit raw p/ph/mu boundary-package leaves, so this localizes before boundary application but does not prove package construction equality.
Existing WRF truth does not split post-acoustic/pre-refresh from final calc_p_rho_phi pressure refresh, so no narrow pressure-refresh or acoustic-finish source fix was applied.
U has no early substage source surface in the reused truth; its earliest checked material residual is the final post-RK/pre-halo comparison.
